mapper.sql: id, settlement_no, order_no, customer_name, equipment_name, service_type, service_fee, parts_fee, total_amount, billing_date, status, payment_method, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tbl_settlement WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_settlement ( settlement_no, order_no, customer_name, equipment_name, service_type, service_fee, parts_fee, total_amount, billing_date, status, payment_method, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{settlementNo}, #{orderNo}, #{customerName}, #{equipmentName}, #{serviceType}, #{serviceFee}, #{partsFee}, #{totalAmount}, #{billingDate}, #{status}, #{paymentMethod}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_settlement
update_time = NOW(), settlement_no = #{settlementNo}, order_no = #{orderNo}, customer_name = #{customerName}, equipment_name = #{equipmentName}, service_type = #{serviceType}, service_fee = #{serviceFee}, parts_fee = #{partsFee}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, billing_date = #{billingDate}, status = #{status}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_settlement SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_settlement SET status = #{status}, billing_date = #{billingDate}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM tbl_settlement WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM tbl_settlement WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM tbl_settlement WHERE deleted = 0 AND status < 2
